application: 2H engine cooling hose route between rubber hose sections
nominal_dimensions_mm: Order one 28-30 mm OD coolant tube blank, wall 1.2-1.6 mm. Buy/quote 1000 mm shop stock if sold by meter; 750 mm is the absolute minimum blank before bending/trimming. End bead height 1.5-2.0 mm; straight clamp lands 25-30 mm each end. Physical sample controls final bends, clocking, offsets, and trimmed centerline length.
material: Mild steel/aluminized steel or 304 stainless tube compatible with coolant; wall 1.2-1.6 mm after fabricator confirmation; corrosion protect external surface
tolerance: OD to hose fit +0.0/-0.5 after caliper confirmation; centerline length +/-2.0; bend clock +/-2 deg; bead height 1.5-2.0
fabrication_method: Use the 1000 mm shop-stock / 750 mm minimum blank and the original pipe as the master template; mandrel-bend matching tube where possible; otherwise cut/weld only with smooth internal transitions; add rolled/beaded hose-retention ends; deburr; clean internally; pressure-test before paint
hold_points: Copy final bends/clocking/offsets from the physical sample; dry-fit on engine/radiator before coating; pressure-test with coolant-compatible caps; do not change the released OD/wall/bead/clamp-land order spec.
notes: The orderable stock spec is exact; extra length is expected trim allowance, not an unresolved vehicle-size dependency.

part_name: Formed coolant pipe rubber connector/coupler hoses
application: Short rubber connector hoses on CP-2H-COOLANT-001 pipe ends
nominal_dimensions_mm: Order 2 x 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blanks, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis. Trim each connector shorter from the old coupler/sample during dry-fit; extra length is trim allowance.
material: EPDM coolant hose SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; new smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
tolerance: Hose ID matched to measured OD with normal coolant-hose interference; no visible kink/ovality at installed bend; clamp lands fully covered without clamp cutting hose
fabrication_method: Keep old rubber couplers with the pipe sample; buy 2 x 500 mm straight EPDM blanks now; trim by sample and dry-fit. Use molded connectors only if straight hose kinks.
hold_points: Dry-fit both trimmed connectors with the formed pipe; confirm hose overlap, clamp band placement, kink clearance, and heat/chafe exposure before coolant fill.
notes: Connector hose stock is now direct-buy released as exact 500 mm blanks at 28-30 mm ID.
